special_programs.label: EU adjusted duties and tariff quotas for US-origin goods
special_programs.scope_note: Eligibility is resolved against the official Annex I/II/III CN entries. Entries marked ex still require product-description confirmation.

treatments.treatment: Common Customs Tariff duty becomes 0% for listed US-origin CN lines.
The ad valorem component is not applied; any specific duty linked to the entry-price system remains.
The listed in-quota rate applies only while the applicable 12-month quota volume remains available.

suspension_watch.note: Monitor possible suspension if the reciprocal US tariff condition for covered steel and aluminium derivatives is not met.
